heading: Sunday Night
text: Partly cloudy, scattered showers north of the border before midnight. Chance for river valley fog, some areas becoming locally dense. Lows in the 50s to near 60. Calm wind.

heading: Monday
text: Any morning valley fog burning off to sunshine. Mixing with clouds in the afternoon. Warmer. Highs in the low to mid 80s, nearing 90 in the warmer valleys. Light and variable wind.

heading: Monday Night
text: Becoming partly cloudy. Mild and humid. Lows in the 60s, a few upper 50s over the higher hills in the north.
